raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Department of Tax and Fee Administration will study the efficacy of a statewide land value taxation system as a potential alternative to current appraisal methods for real property taxation.",
    "Current property tax systems may discourage landowners from building or improving property due to the potential for increased taxes.",
    "Financial incentives exist for landowners to hold unused land or leave property vacant to avoid price appreciation under the current property tax system.",
    "A land value tax could discourage speculative land holding aimed at avoiding tax increases.",
    "The implementation of a land value tax in Allentown, Pennsylvania led to a 32% increase in building permits."
  ]
}
```
